intake.user_request: Add @coderef-semantic headers to the remaining 271 elements (15% of 2,488) that are missing them, targeting <50 missing (90%+ coverage). Priority: CLI entry points first.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Stub category: enhancement → phased. Two phases: Phase 1 annotates the top missing files (CLI entry points + scripts), Phase 2 handles the long tail and validates final coverage.

in_scope: Add @coderef-semantic headers to all 76 files with missing-status elements
Annotate __tests__/ files with layer: test (not fixture files with embedded string literals)
Run populate-coderef after each phase to validate headerStatus transitions
out_of_scope: Annotating __tests__/ fixture files that embed @coderef-semantic as test data strings
Changing existing defined headers (this WO is additive only)

constraints: Headers must not create duplicate blocks — run deduplicate-headers.mjs after --source-headers runs
@layer values must be valid: cli for src/cli/, tooling for scripts/, test for __tests__/
After adding headers, run populate-coderef and confirm headerStatus transitions from missing → defined
Do not annotate fixture files that embed @coderef-semantic as string literals in test data
